name: sat_dodeca_chr3_centromere
description: Drosophila simple satellite block: dodeca satellite (12 bp repeat CCCGTACTGGT) at chr3 centromere. Strict chr3-specific marker.. Drosophila satellites are chromosome-position-specific and used as cytogenetic markers (Lohe 1993). They form most of the ~30% of the genome that is heterochromatin.
